summary: Completed testing of 3DKPRINT website frontend functionality. Main site works correctly with proper navigation dropdowns, but encountered access issues with admin panel preventing full testing of orçamentos and produção features.

ui_bugs.issue: Painel Admin button on login page has timeout issues when clicking
Admin pages appear to render as blank/white screens after navigation attempts

integration_issues.issue: Cannot access admin panel to test orçamentos and produção functionality

passed_tests: Main 3DKPRINT website loads correctly with proper branding
Header navigation shows Marcas dropdown menu with proper icon
Header navigation shows Serviços dropdown menu with proper icon
Login page accessible at /login with clean professional design
Login page shows multiple access options (Entrar, Cadastro Cliente, Painel Admin)
Website has consistent 3DKPRINT branding with blue and gold colors
Main website navigation and layout working correctly
Footer with proper company information and links

critical_fixes: Fix admin panel access - Painel Admin button is not clickable or has navigation issues
Investigate admin page rendering issues - pages appear blank after navigation
Verify admin authentication flow and ensure proper routing to /admin/orcamentos and /admin/producao
verification_needed: Admin orçamentos page with 'Novo Orçamento Manual' button functionality
Modal functionality for creating new orçamentos
Action buttons (Ver, Email, WhatsApp, PDF) on orçamento items
Dropdown menus showing all 8 expected brands and 5 expected services
minor_improvements: Add data-testid attributes to admin panel elements for better testing
Ensure admin pages have proper loading states
